case_title: LYONS, MELINDA et al VS JOHNSON, ROSEANN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $798.15 FILED BY LYONS, MELINDA MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSEANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYONS, MELINDA MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSEANN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSEANN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $603.52 AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSEANN
